Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; bottle_1 is right of box_1 blocking box_1 right side.
Postcondition: bottle_1 has been pushed from the front by the right arm.

Precondition: box_1 left and right sides are accessible; both end effectors grasp nothing.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact on right & left sides.
